name: rettoria-sgt-site
description: Pro bono website for Rettoria SGT — multilingual Next.js + Sanity CMS.

scripts.dev: concurrently --raw "npm run dev:web | node scripts/with-timestamp.mjs [WEB]" "npm run dev:studio | node scripts/with-timestamp.mjs [STUDIO]"
scripts.build: npm run build:web && npm run build:studio
scripts.lint: npm run lint:web && npm run lint:studio
